description: Sent to the submitter when a red-flag override is activated on their idea
subject: [G42 SaaS Factory] Important Update — {{idea_name}}
body:
Important Update on Your Idea

Dear {{submitter_name}},

A concern has been flagged on your idea "{{idea_name}}" that needs to be resolved before it can progress further.

Your idea has been placed on hold until the following is addressed:

  • Viable tenancy or data isolation approach
  • Design partner or pilot path confirmed
  • Accountable product owner assigned
  • Unit economics viability
Idea{{idea_name}}
Current Stage{{current_stage}}

Please work with the SaaS Factory team to resolve the flagged condition(s). Once resolved, your idea will continue through the evaluation process.

Best regards,
G42 SaaS Factory Team

You are receiving this because you submitted this idea to the G42 SaaS Factory Board.
